results.rendered_html:
suta p. p.
1 Poured out.
2 Extracted or expressed (as Soma juice).
3 Begotten, produced, brought forth.
— taḥ
1 A son.
2 A child, offspring.
3 A king.
— taḥ taṃ A Soma libation.
Comp.
— arthin a. desirous of progeny.
— ātmajaḥ a grandson.
— (jā) a grand-daughter.
